title: Lead Routing Engine
description: ARCHETYPE: routing_engine. Shape: the app CLASSIFIES an incoming record into one of N buckets via rules, then assigns it. The CORE is a branching if/else ladder or a rules table — NOT generic CRUD. An incoming lead is assigned to a rep based on company size: Enterprise → 'alice', Mid-Market → 'bob', SMB → 'charlie'. The routing logic must appear in the POST handler (not as a database column default). DO NOT just accept and save — the ROUTING decision is the point. Include: POST /api/leads (routes + saves), GET /api/leads (lists), GET /api/leads/by/:rep (filter by assigned rep). No auth scaffold, no pages.
skeleton:
build for javascript backend

create a Leads table:
  company, required
  email, required
  size, required
  assigned_to
  created_at_date, auto

# Your routing logic + endpoints here.
# POST /api/leads must branch on `size` and set assigned_to accordingly BEFORE saving:
#   - 'Enterprise' → 'alice'
#   - 'Mid-Market' → 'bob'
#   - 'SMB' → 'charlie'

steps.name: Sets assigned_to to a rep name
